rulings.Case Title: ALEXANDER GARCIA VS. DAVID O' KEEFFE AND KARI O'KEEFFE, ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 20, 2017, line 3. DEFENDANT GERARD O'KEEFFE, O'KEEFFE FAMILY TRUST, MAKRAS REAL ESTATE, DAVID O'KEEFFE, KARI O'KEEFFE, G. MAKRAS, FARAH MAKRAS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained as to the first cause of action for Plaintiff to allege a contractual relationship with each defendant against whom this cause of action is alleged. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the second cause of action for Plaintiff to allege facts giving rise to this cause of action as to each defendant in light of "Disclosure Regarding Real Estate Agency." Demurrer is overruled as to the third and fourth causes of action. All elements of these causes of action are sufficiently alleged in the Complaint as a whole. Plaintiff is ordered to comply with CCP 1005 and 2.7B in future. Failure to comply may result in motion being treated as unopposed. = (501/REQ)
